title: Brazil ke Jungles
excerpt: Brazil ke jungles ko bachane ke liye naya satellite imagery map banaya ja raha hai. Kya yeh technology India mein bhi kaam aayegi? Google ne Brazilian government ke saath milkar ek naye satellite imagery map par kaam kiya hai.
content:
Brazil ke jungles ko bachane ke liye naya satellite imagery map banaya ja raha hai, jisse yeh pata chalega ki kaunse areas mein deforestation ho raha hai. Yeh project Google ne Brazilian government ke saath milkar shuru kiya hai, jiske tahat satellite se li gayi images ko analyze kiya jayega aur yeh dekha jayega ki kaunse areas mein jungle kaatne ki ghatna ho rahi hai.

 Is project ke tahat, Google ka satellite imagery platform Planetary Computer use kiya jayega, jisse high-resolution images li jayengi aur phir unhein analyze kiya jayega. Isse yeh pata chalega ki kaunse areas mein jungle kaatne ki ghatna ho rahi hai aur kahaan par conservation efforts ko badhava dena hai. Yeh technology na keval Brazil ke jungles ko bachane mein madad karegi, balki poore Latin America ke jungles ko bhi bachayegi.

 Ab yeh sawal uthata hai ki kya India mein bhi is tarah ki satellite imagery technology ka upyog vanspati aur paryavaran sanrakshan mein kiya ja sakta hai? Jawab hai, haan. India mein bhi is tarah ki technology ka upyog kiya ja sakta hai, khaskar humare desh mein jungle kaatne ki ghatna bhi bahut zyada ho rahi hai. Is technology se hum yeh pata kar sakte hain ki kaunse areas mein jungle kaatne ki ghatna ho rahi hai aur kahaan par conservation efforts ko badhava dena hai.

 Iske alawa, India mein bhi satellite imagery technology ka upyog kai anya kshetron mein bhi kiya ja sakta hai, jaise ki krishi, jal sanrakshan, aur bhukamp ki bhavishyavani. To yeh dekhna dilchasp hoga ki India mein is tarah ki technology ka upyog kaise kiya jata hai aur kya yeh humare desh ke liye upyogi sabit hoti hai.
